caption: Product intent survives only when each transition remains inspectable; learning begins the next loop rather than ending the work.
alt_text: Product intent survives only when each transition remains inspectable; learning begins the next loop rather than ending the work.
title: Signal-to-learning operating chain
reader_job: See the whole book's through-line

caption: Technical participation progresses through observable work, not status; the appropriate stopping point depends on the product and risk.
alt_text: Technical participation progresses through observable work, not status; the appropriate stopping point depends on the product and risk.
title: Participation ladder: ask, inspect, prototype, contribute
reader_job: Choose the appropriate technical floor

caption: The registration promise crosses multiple actors; success and recovery states both belong in the product conversation.
alt_text: The registration promise crosses multiple actors; success and recovery states both belong in the product conversation.
title: Registration request/response sequence
reader_job: Trace user action through client, API, service, and response

caption: A delivery path separates code integration, deployment, exposure, and the decision to continue.
alt_text: A delivery path separates code integration, deployment, exposure, and the decision to continue.
title: Commit-to-production delivery path
reader_job: Distinguish CI, delivery, deployment, and rollout

caption: The image-asset journey connects selection and validation to authorised transfer, processing, product state, variants, and delivery. Later sections examine each boundary.
alt_text: The image-asset journey connects selection and validation to authorised transfer, processing, product state, variants, and delivery. Later sections examine each boundary.
title: Original asset to responsive delivery
reader_job: See storage, transformation, CDN, cache, and device path

caption: Asset state is user-visible product behavior; “uploaded” is not the only meaningful outcome.
alt_text: Asset state is user-visible product behavior; “uploaded” is not the only meaningful outcome.
title: Asset-state lifecycle
reader_job: Separate upload, processing, ready, failed, and replacement states

caption: The query grain changes as tables join: one customer can have many rentals, and one rental may have multiple payment records. Confirm the intended unit before aggregating.
alt_text: The query grain changes as tables join: one customer can have many rentals, and one rental may have multiple payment records. Confirm the intended unit before aggregating.
title: Relational grain through joins
reader_job: See how one customer, many rentals, and multiple payments change the unit of analysis
rights_source_note: Original; aligned with validated SQL fixture

caption: Product analytics combines stored state, event streams, identity, time, and semantic definitions; no dashboard exists independently of those choices.
alt_text: Product analytics combines stored state, event streams, identity, time, and semantic definitions; no dashboard exists independently of those choices.
title: Event-to-metric semantic chain
reader_job: Separate event data from metric definition and decision

caption: The go/no-go flow separates evidence validity, product benefit, downside, uncertainty, and action.
alt_text: The go/no-go flow separates evidence validity, product benefit, downside, uncertainty, and action.
title: Experiment go/no-go decision flow
reader_job: Preserve the original course decision concept while separating validity, evidence, guardrails, and product action
rights_source_note: Author-owned course concept; substantively revised; independent statistics review pending

caption: The reverse-logistics flow: hub and driver scanning were implemented, while partner-side receipt confirmation remained planned.
alt_text: The reverse-logistics flow: hub and driver scanning were implemented, while partner-side receipt confirmation remained planned.
title: Shipper reverse-logistics custody sequence
reader_job: Show how scans create timestamped responsibility across partner, hub, fleet, and a shared backend
rights_source_note: Original reconstruction from author account; employer verification required

caption: The e-wallet flow makes pending, failed, duplicate-safe, and support-visible behavior part of the requirement rather than late implementation detail.
alt_text: The e-wallet flow makes pending, failed, duplicate-safe, and support-visible behavior part of the requirement rather than late implementation detail.
title: E-wallet flow with happy, error, and recovery states
reader_job: Expose missing product states

caption: A design decision becomes infrastructure only when meaning survives from principle and token through code, states, composition, and review.
alt_text: A design decision becomes infrastructure only when meaning survives from principle and token through code, states, composition, and review.
title: Token-component-pattern-product hierarchy
reader_job: Show design-system layers and governance

caption: Behavioral models generate competing diagnoses; evidence selects among them, and measurement keeps the intervention accountable.
alt_text: Behavioral models generate competing diagnoses; evidence selects among them, and measurement keeps the intervention accountable.
title: Behavior diagnosis: Fogg and COM-B
reader_job: Compare two lenses without merging them
rights_source_note: Original text treatment; cite both models; do not trace official art

caption: The feature becomes manageable when the fixed rules, the model's judgment, the checks, the fallback, and the user's control are each made explicit rather than blurred together.
alt_text: The feature becomes manageable when the fixed rules, the model's judgment, the checks, the fallback, and the user's control are each made explicit rather than blurred together.
title: Heatseeker onboarding deterministic–probabilistic boundary
reader_job: Locate retrieval policy, synthesis, validation, fallback, and user authority

caption: A hybrid design assigns exact control, bounded interpretation, validation, and user authority to different components.
alt_text: A hybrid design assigns exact control, bounded interpretation, validation, and user authority to different components.
title: Heatseeker hybrid solution shape
reader_job: Assign exact control, bounded interpretation, validation, and confirmation

caption: A model-backed application separates evidence selection, model generation, deterministic validation, user or tool authority, and the records needed for evaluation.
alt_text: A model-backed application separates evidence selection, model generation, deterministic validation, user or tool authority, and the records needed for evaluation.
title: Model-backed application pipeline
reader_job: Separate retrieval, context, generation, tools, validation, user control, tracing, and evaluation
rights_source_note: Original synthesis; vendor behavior is version-sensitive

caption: Final-answer quality depends on identity, evidence, analysis, ranking, synthesis, and UI trust—not only on the generation model.
alt_text: Final-answer quality depends on identity, evidence, analysis, ranking, synthesis, and UI trust—not only on the generation model.
title: Competitor-ad evaluation pipeline
reader_job: Connect identity, collection, multimodal analysis, ranking, synthesis, and inspectable evidence
rights_source_note: Original reconstruction from author account; external-provider review needed

caption: Calibration is a human-directed quality loop: an observed failure becomes a preserved case, bounded change, regression-tested release, and new production evidence.
alt_text: Calibration is a human-directed quality loop: an observed failure becomes a preserved case, bounded change, regression-tested release, and new production evidence.
title: Human-directed Heatseeker calibration loop
reader_job: Show preserved failure, diagnosis, bounded change, regression, release, and production evidence
rights_source_note: Original synthesis from author account and Notion course

caption: The observable agent loop: the harness assembles governed context, the runtime selects an allowed skill, permitted tools return observations, and the run either continues within its limits or returns control to the user.
alt_text: The observable agent loop: the harness assembles governed context, the runtime selects an allowed skill, permitted tools return observations, and the run either continues within its limits or returns control to the user.
title: Bounded agent operating loop
reader_job: Separate observable context, governed skills, permitted tools, validated observations, and stop decisions

caption: Agent context should preserve the evidence-to-decision thread and end in human-verifiable work, not an isolated prompt transcript.
alt_text: Agent context should preserve the evidence-to-decision thread and end in human-verifiable work, not an isolated prompt transcript.
title: Agent operating contract
reader_job: Separate context, tools, constraints, output, and verification

caption: Repo orientation connects the user promise to implementation, checks, environments, and accountable reviewers; product context can explain rationale, but it does not replace runtime verification or human ownership.
alt_text: Repo orientation connects the user promise to implementation, checks, environments, and accountable reviewers; product context can explain rationale, but it does not replace runtime verification or human ownership.
title: Repo as product surface
reader_job: Show instructions, code precedents, checks, environments, and reviewers
rights_source_note: Original; Developer Way cited for influence

caption: Evidence operations preserve lineage by carrying each observation through classification, product artifacts, implementation evidence, and an explicit decision that updates the next source of truth.
alt_text: Evidence operations preserve lineage by carrying each observation through classification, product artifacts, implementation evidence, and an explicit decision that updates the next source of truth.
title: Evidence operations continuity
reader_job: Trace observation to decision without losing provenance

caption: Prototype fidelity is a decision ladder, not a maturity race: move only as far as the learning question requires, and treat production exposure as a separate commitment.
alt_text: Prototype fidelity is a decision ladder, not a maturity race: move only as far as the learning question requires, and treat production exposure as a separate commitment.
title: Prototype fidelity ladder
reader_job: Match prototype cost to learning question

caption: Building becomes shipping only after the change survives verification, review, controlled exposure, and measurement.
alt_text: Building becomes shipping only after the change survives verification, review, controlled exposure, and measurement.
title: Building is not shipping
reader_job: Trace spec through local QA, automated checks, reviews, preview, flag, rollout, monitoring, and GTM
